text.body:
Hi 👋


I'm a Professional Video Editor & Thumbnail Designer. I can help you create engaging YouTube videos, Shorts, Reels, travel vlogs, challenge videos, and social media content.

🎬 My Services:
• Professional Video Editing
• YouTube Shorts & Reels Editing
• Motion Graphics
• Sound Effects & Music Sync
• Color Correction/Grading
• High CTR Thumbnail Design


Please share:

1. Your video footage
2. Reference video (if any)
3. Editing style you want
4. Deadline

Portfolio:- https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1vkJDvxpiKjyOMGUKWfYHKhNsCQYv0zNs

Looking forward to working with you! 🚀
